name: Okta MFA Factor Reset/Suspend Events (30 days)
description: Detects MFA reset or suspension actions in Okta system logs, aligned with public Okta persistence detections.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id AS affected_user_id, COALESCE(target_user.login, target_user.email, l.target_id) AS affected_user, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id LEFT JOIN okta_users target_user ON target_user.id = l.target_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('user.mfa.factor.reset_all', 'user.mfa.factor.suspend') AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Confirm MFA reset/suspend actions were approved, re-secure affected accounts, and force re-enrollment where needed.
